heading: Train With Me

offerings.title: Private Sessions
offerings.description: One-on-one or small group instruction. Depending on schedule, location, and travel arrangement.

offerings.title: Regular Training
offerings.description: Join Lapunti Karilyon's Sunday sessions at UP Diliman. Beginner-friendly, progressive curriculum.

offerings.title: Group Seminar Sessions
offerings.description: Minimum 10 students. Special session rates plus travel and accommodation expenses apply.

offerings.title: Personal Students
offerings.description: Accepting students who cannot train at Lapunti Karilyon. With the possibility of establishing a local child group or school under the Lapunti Karilyon umbrella.

note: As with any responsible martial art teacher, I reserve the right to interview or assess potential students, and if necessary, to refuse or discontinue instruction.
